name: TINYpulse
tagline: AI-driven employee pulse surveys and real-time feedback analytics
description: TINYpulse provides real-time, AI-driven pulse surveys and employee feedback analytics that help HR teams quickly identify and act on workforce concerns. Its AI analyzes open-ended responses to detect sentiment trends, predict engagement risks, and surface emerging issues before they become problems. TINYpulse makes it easy to gather continuous feedback without survey fatigue.
